deals.post_en: This Revlon ColorStay eyebrow pencil helps you define and fill your eyebrows with precision. It includes a built-in spoolie brush for a natural finish and is ideal for those looking to enhance their gaze.

deals.title: 105-Count Clorox Fraganzia Fabric Softener Dryer Sheets (Hawaiian Escape)
deals.title_es: Toallitas para Secadora Clorox Fraganzia (105 unidades, Hawaiian Escape)
deals.post: Las toallitas para secadora Clorox Fraganzia dejan tu ropa suave y con un fresco aroma Hawaiian Escape. Son perfectas para añadir una fragancia duradera y reducir la estática en cada ciclo de lavado.
deals.post_en: Clorox Fraganzia dryer sheets leave your clothes soft with a fresh Hawaiian Escape scent. They are perfect for adding a long-lasting fragrance and reducing static in every laundry cycle.

deals.title: 1TB Verbatim Pocket SSD, Up to 1000MB/s, USB-C, USB 3.2 Gen 2 at Amazon
deals.title_es: SSD Portátil Verbatim de 1TB, Hasta 1000MB/s, USB-C, USB 3.2 Gen 2
deals.post: Este SSD portátil Verbatim de 1TB ofrece almacenamiento de alta velocidad con hasta 1000MB/s para tus archivos más importantes. Con conexión USB-C y USB 3.2 Gen 2, es ideal para profesionales y usuarios que necesitan transferencias rápidas y fiables.
deals.post_en: This Verbatim 1TB Pocket SSD offers high-speed storage with up to 1000MB/s for your most important files. Featuring USB-C and USB 3.2 Gen 2 connectivity, it's ideal for professionals and users who need fast and reliable transfers.

deals.title: $12ac AMAZON FS PRIME LISEN Retractable Car Charger, 84W Car Charger USB C Fast Charge, Multi Cigarette Lighter Adapter, 4 in 1
deals.title_es: LISEN Cargador de Coche Retráctil 84W USB C de Carga Rápida, Adaptador Múltiple 4 en 1
deals.post: Este cargador retráctil para coche LISEN ofrece carga rápida de 84W con USB-C y funciona como adaptador múltiple para encendedor. Es ideal para mantener tus dispositivos cargados eficientemente durante tus viajes en coche.
deals.post_en: This LISEN retractable car charger provides 84W fast charging with USB-C and acts as a multi cigarette lighter adapter. It's perfect for keeping your devices efficiently charged during car journeys.
